reviews.comment:
Cada vez que vengo a cargar con qr no tienen disponibilidad, siempre hay un problema, cuando no es la luz es el sistema pero nunca puedo usar el la aplicación

(Translated by Google)
Every time I come to charge with a QR code they don't have it available, there's always a problem; when it's not the power it's the system, but I can never use the app
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9753367623669844910/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURoNVA3RW5nRRAB

reviews.comment:
Pésima la atención. Se ve que el playero que me atendió le da prioridad a sus 'amistades'. Estaba para cargar combustible y un a Sr con un bidón que no está permitido le cargo combustible y después a una moto sin casco dio vuelta en 'u' y le cargo y a mí me dijo que de la vuelta porque no era el orden de carga.

(Translated by Google)
The service was terrible. It was clear the attendant who helped me prioritized his 'friends'. I was there to fill up, and he pumped gas for a man with a jerrycan, which isn't allowed. Then he made a U-turn and pumped gas for a motorcycle without a helmet, but told me to go around because it wasn't the correct order for refueling.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9753367623669844910/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoX1pUVWNnEAE
